title: Correction: A Single-Arm Phase 2 Trial of Doxorubicin Plus Zalifrelimab (Anti-CTLA-4 Antibody) and Balstilimab (Anti-PD-1 Antibody) in Advanced/Metastatic Soft Tissue Sarcomas.
trial_name: Doxorubicin alone versus Doxorubicin with Trabectedin as First-Line Therapy for Metastatic or Unresectable Leiomyosarcoma
